_comment: Sample hosted-memory retrieval results for fixtures/tests. Synthetic data only - no real tenant content, no credential, no endpoint.

query.task: Plan the next OSS MCP foundation PR

results.text: Prior decision: keep the MCP server to two tools (get_context, list_constraints) in v0.
Past lane: the compiler source list expanded to nine files in Phase 2.
Reminder: hosted features stay behind a fail-closed adapter with local defaults.
